Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73584

Visit Date: 2026-01-17 00:00:00
Diagnosis: I46.9-Cardiac arrest, unspecified

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (7 line(s), total difference: 107.24 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.

PRIOR AUTHORIZATION (1 line(s)):
  Services were provided on an emergency/urgent basis where prior authorization
  could not be obtained in advance. Retroactive authorization is requested.
  Request: Grant retroactive authorization based on clinical urgency.
  - Seq 11: MOHS-B0730 - MORTUARY RENT PER DAY (SAR 205.67)

QUANTITY EXCEEDED (2 line(s)):
  The quantities billed reflect the actual services provided based on clinical need.
  Extended treatment was required due to patient condition complexity.
  Request: Review and approve the actual quantities administered.
  - Seq 7: MOHS-B0719 Qty=1 (SAR 548.44)
  - Seq 5: MOHS-B0758 Qty=1 (SAR 342.77)
